summary:
Claim: Nitrous oxide can induce paradoxical excitement in children.  
Evidence: - Paradoxical excitement occurs due to disruption of GABA_A receptor-mediated inhibition, leading to hyperactivity or agitation. - Younger children are at greater risk due to underdeveloped central nervous systems and increased metabolic activity affecting neurotransmitter balance.  
Answer: C
